global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on clarity and action.
global.main_message: Promoting ClearLedger's financial services with a focus on clarity and ease of use.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A combination of circles and rectangles in a light blue background, creating an abstract design.

elements.label: ClearLedger logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'ClearLedger' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: Text that reads 'Your money, clearer' in a large, clear font, emphasizing the service's clarity.

elements.label: Additional info
elements.description: Smaller text below the main message that states 'Fast signup, instant card' in a concise format.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Book now' in a bold font, encouraging immediate action.
elements.text_content: Your money, clearer Fast signup  instant card

elements.label: Ad headline
elements.description: The headline 'ClearLedger' is displayed prominently at the top, setting the theme of the ad.

elements.label: Secondary call to action
elements.description: A smaller button at the bottom right with the text 'Book now', inviting users to take action.

embedding_texts.global_text: ClearLedger, financial services, banner, simple and modern, key elements include logo, main message, and call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main message and additional info in the center, with the CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: ClearLedger, Your money, clearer, Fast signup, instant card, Book now
